name: DPI
description: DPI is a leader of Private Equity in Africa. Founded in 2007, DPI has over US$1.5bn of assets under management and has raised two pan-African private equity funds; inaugural fund African Development Partners I (ADP I) and African Development Partners II (ADP II).

## Founded Year
1965
## Mosaic Score
The Mosaic Score is an algorithm that measures the overall financial health and market potential of private companies.
+2 points in the past 30 days
## About DPI GLOBAL
DPI GLOBAL operates within the agricultural and animal nutrition sectors. The company provides products focused on odor elimination and animal performance. DPI GLOBAL's products are applicable across various markets including poultry, swine, dairy, and others. It was founded in 1965 and is based in Porterville, California.
## Headquarters Location
17656 Ave. 168
Porterville, California, 93257,
United States

T
[Toomics](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/toomics)
Toomics is a South Korean webtoon platform.
![Dropbox Logo](https://www.cbinsights.com/images/twitter/profile_images/1085215038657441794/PQ23AUmr_normal.jpg)
[Dropbox](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/dropbox)
Dropbox, founded by Drew Houston and Arash Ferdowsi (MIT engineers) in 2007, is a cross-platform cloud storage solution, with support for Windows, Mac OS X, and Linux. Files in a user's Dropbox folder are continuously kept in sync between the user's computers and securely backed up online. Folders in the Dropbox can also be shared with others, causing many businesses to abandon traditional network drives and VPNs.
![BigBasket Logo](https://www.cbinsights.com/images/twitter/profile_images/637332719110782976/r2i3P3xC_normal.jpg)
[BigBasket](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/supermarket-grocery-supplies)
BigBasket is a hyperlocal online grocery delivery platform based in Bengaluru, India.On February 16th, 2021, Tata Group acquired a majority stake in BigBasket at a valuation at $1926.47M
![Wayfair Logo](https://www.cbinsights.com/images/twitter/profile_images/898582455048974336/fGVxLrW0_normal.jpg)
[Wayfair](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/wayfair)
Wayfair, formerly CSN Stores, is an online catalog of furniture, lighting, cookware and more. With a selection of more than five million products, people can find just the right items for homes. Other sites under the Wayfair.com umbrella include AllModern.com and JossAndMain.com. Wayfair.com operates distribution and operations centers in Ogden, Utah and Hebron, Kentucky, and international offices in Galway, Ireland, London, Berlin and Sydney.
![Craigslist Logo](https://www.cbinsights.com/images/twitter/profile_images/151360140/cl_normal.jpg)
[Craigslist](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/craigslist)
Craigslist is a classifieds service with local classifieds and forums for more than 550 cities in over 50 countries worldwide. The classifieds are moderated and generally free and target jobs, housing, goods, services, romance, local activities, and advice.
T
[Theta Labs](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/theta-labs)
Theta Labs specializes in video streaming powered by users and the blockchain.
## Discover the right solution for your team
The CB Insights tech market intelligence platform analyzes millions of data points on vendors, products, partnerships, and patents to help your team find their next technology solution.
